h1: Home Additions Services in Lutz, FL
intro: Expand your living space in Lutz, FL with Titan Homes Group. We design and build room additions, second stories, sunrooms, and garage conversions that seamlessly integrate with your home.
bodyContent:
When your family outgrows your current space or your lifestyle demands more room, Titan Homes Group designs and builds the perfect addition for your Lutz home. Our fully licensed general contracting team handles every phase — from architectural planning and permit management through foundation work, framing, roofing, and finish work.

Home additions are among the most valuable investments a Lutz homeowner can make. Whether you need a primary bedroom suite, a home office, an in-law suite, a sunroom with views of your Florida yard, or a full second-story addition, Titan Homes Group delivers additions that are structurally sound, architecturally harmonious with your existing home, and beautifully finished.

Our Lutz home addition services include all permit management with your local jurisdiction, coordination of all trades (structural, mechanical, electrical, plumbing, and finish), 3D design concepts, and our standard 100% satisfaction guarantee.

Titan Homes Group is proud to hold Florida General Contractor License #CBC1264713, giving Lutz homeowners the assurance that every addition is designed, permitted, and built to code.

faqs.question: Do home additions require permits in Lutz, FL?
faqs.answer: Yes. All home additions in Lutz require building permits. Titan Homes Group manages the entire permitting process with Hillsborough County or your local jurisdiction, ensuring full code compliance and protecting your investment.

faqs.question: How much does a home addition cost in Lutz?
faqs.answer: Home addition costs in Lutz vary significantly based on size and type. A single-room addition might start around $50,000, while a second-story addition can range from $150,000 to $400,000+. We provide detailed quotes after assessing your property and discussing your vision.

faqs.question: How long does a home addition take in Lutz?
faqs.answer: Most home additions in Lutz take 3–6 months from permit approval to completion. Larger projects like second-story additions may take 6–9 months. We provide a detailed construction schedule at the start of every project.
